title: seq

messages.description: starts or restarts playing a sequence at normal speed
raw MIDI data stream to be recorded
raw MIDI data stream from played sequence
sent at the end of a sequence (useful for looping)

arguments.description: a MIDI/text file to be loaded

methods.description: reads from MIDI/text files (no symbol opens a dialog box)
start/restart sequence at a given tempo
stops recording/playing and goes back to start
records at the end of the stored sequence
sends a bang at each tick
onset time in ms of the first event
adds (in ms) to the onset delay
multiplies all the event times by the given number
prints sequence's first 16 events in the Pd window

body: [seq] plays/records raw MIDI streams and can save/read MIDI sequence files. All tracks of a multi-track midi file are merged into one.
